title: Recruitment
intro: Join our team of dedicated professionals. Prime College is always looking for talented individuals to help us deliver exceptional education.

openings.title: Business Management Tutor
openings.description: We are seeking an experienced Business Management tutor to deliver engaging and high-quality teaching across Level 4-7 qualifications.

openings.title: Health & Social Care Assessor
openings.description: Join our Health & Social Care department to assess and support learners through their qualifications.

openings.title: Student Admissions Officer
openings.description: Manage student enquiries, applications, and enrolment processes to ensure a smooth admissions journey.

meta.title: Recruitment – Prime College
meta.description: Explore career opportunities at Prime College. Join our team of education professionals.
